turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan hello. Mujhe ek urgent appointment chahiye. Mera BP bahut high aa raha hai — 180/110. Kya aaj mil sakta hai?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ji yeh serious hai. Aaj ke liye emergency slot available hai. Aapka naam aur number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bharat ji, please aaj dopahar 2 baje aa jaiye. Dr. Ramesh Iyer aapko dekh lenge. Agar BP aur badhe ya chest pain, numbness jaise symptoms aaye toh seedha emergency mein aana.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Theek hai, aata hoon. Koi medicines lena chahiye abhi?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Main medical advice nahi de sakta, lekin please apni purani BP medicines agar hain toh saath laayein. Doctor decide karenge. Jaldi aaiye.
